upstreamCalls.query: query MetaobjectDefinitionHydrateByType($type: String!) { metaobjectDefinitionByType(type: $type) { id type name description displayNameKey access { admin storefront } capabilities { publishable { enabled } translatable { enabled } renderable { enabled } onlineStore { enabled } } fieldDefinitions { key name description required type { name category } capabilities { adminFilterable { enabled } } validations { name value } } hasThumbnailField metaobjectsCount standardTemplate { type name } createdAt updatedAt } }
